label: compound-page-name-in-prose
title: Render a helpful error on the forgot password page when the email is unknown
body:
# Render a helpful error on the forgot password page

The forgot password page currently shows a generic "something went wrong" banner when the email address is not in the system. Replace it with a specific, reassuring message that does not leak account existence.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] AC-1: Visiting the forgot password page and submitting an unknown email renders the new banner text.
- [ ] AC-2: Account existence is not disclosed in the banner copy.
- [ ] AC-3: Screenshot evidence of the new banner captured 2 s after submit.
